summary: A clip of a roundtable event with a backdrop reading 'MAKING AMERICA SAFE AGAIN' and 'MEMPHIS TENNESSEE'. Two men in suits sit at a table with water bottles, name placards and microphones; a lectern with the presidential seal and a display of boxes, one marked 'DEA', and packaged items sit in the foreground. One man speaks while the other listens.

script.scene: Two men in suits at a table before a 'MAKING AMERICA SAFE AGAIN / MEMPHIS TENNESSEE' backdrop; a presidential-seal lectern and a 'DEA' box in front.
The same setting continues as the seated men speak.

notable_text: MAKING AMERICA SAFE AGAIN; MEMPHIS TENNESSEE; DEA; PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES
